title: The Affairs of Susan
writer: Thomas Monroe, László Görög, Richard Flournoy
actors: Joan Fontaine, George Brent, Dennis O'Keefe
plot: Susan is about to be married, but the wedding may get called off after her fiancé summons three former beaus. Each reveals a different portrait of Susan: one describes her as a naive country girl who reluctantly becomes an actress...
awards: Nominated for 1 Oscar. 1 win & 1 nomination total
